$comment: Machine-readable mirror of docs/lattice-chains.md. Maintained by-hand alongside the .md inventory. Pairing enforced by tests/lib/lattice-self-maintenance.test.ts. End-to-end chain-closure assertion enforced by tests/lib/lattice-chain-closure.test.ts (#2057). Each chain captures the ordered set of producer/consumer links along a Lattice path; per-link gates verify each step exists, this manifest captures the adjacent-link KEY contract that per-link gates miss.

chain.id: kebab-case identifier — must also appear in docs/lattice-chains.md somewhere
chain.title: Plain-English producer→consumer→...→terminal statement
chain.links: Ordered array of links N=0..K-1. Each link is one stage in the chain.
chain.tolerated_drift: Array of { from_link_index, to_link_index, reason } — explicit per-adjacent-pair debt the gate must not flag. Ratchet: count cannot grow without an explicit JSON edit.
chain.terminal_reaches: Optional: the runtime surface where the terminal output reaches (informational; covered by sibling coverage-producer-consumer test).

link.stage: Logical stage label (MEASURE / AGGREGATE / ADAPT / COMPOSE / RENDER / ...). Free-form, but should match docs/CHAIN-CONTRACTS.md vocabulary.
link.producer: Repo-relative path to the producer file (file must exist).
link.consumer: Optional: repo-relative path to the consumer file. Use producer-only when the link is just a write.
link.outputKey: The KEY the producer writes — column path, jsonb shape, key-name token, parameterId, contract-id, storagePath segment, etc. May contain {placeholder} tokens for templated keys.
link.consumesKey: Optional: the KEY this consumer reads. Adjacent-link closure asserts: previous link's outputKey == this link's consumesKey (modulo placeholder substitution).
link.kind: row-write / callerAttribute-write / column-write / section-emit / json-field / spec-rule / registry-entry / renderer-push / cascade-resolve — used as an informational tag.

chains.title: BEH parameter measurement → CallScore.parameterId → AGGREGATE spec.sourceParameter → AGGREGATE writes CallerAttribute(behavior_profile:*) → ADAPT reads CallerAttribute → ADAPT emits directive → renderer pushes section
chains.terminal_reaches: voicePrompt prose delivered to VAPI on next call

chains.title: Parameter registry → MEASURE writer → AGGREGATE/ADAPT/REWARD consumer (the M1/M2 loop)
chains.terminal_reaches: Cascade-readable state for next composed prompt — sibling gate tests/lib/measurement/parameter-loop-closure.test.ts pins per-parameter loop closure with ratchet at 68 gaps.

chains.title: Composition transform produces directive → renderPromptSummary pushes into prose → voicePrompt section emit
chains.terminal_reaches: voicePrompt prose. Sibling gate tests/lib/prompt/composition/coverage-producer-consumer.test.ts (#1848) pins the per-transform→renderer manifest with PAIRS map + sweep.

chains.title: JOURNEY_SETTINGS registry entry → transform reads storagePath → renderer pushes section
chains.terminal_reaches: voicePrompt prose. Sibling gates tests/lib/journey/registry-consumer-coverage.test.ts (#1849) + tests/lib/prompt/composition/coverage-producer-consumer.test.ts (#1848) pin per-storagePath / per-transform-directive coverage with ratchets.
